## Summary

Authority Research Sprint 1 completed 2026-06-30. Two new research documents created: `supplement-safety-authority-research.md` and `supplement-need-assessment-authority-research.md`. Clusters 7 & 8 are now CLEARED — unlocking the two most strategic Priority A articles for LevNytt. Four Priority A articles are now authority-cleared and ready for production: (1) Behöver jag kosttillskott?, (2) Är kosttillskott farligt?, (3) Omega-3 komplett guide, (4) MLM inkomstredovisningar. Remaining blockers (kreatin, adaptogener, longevity, kvinnohälsa PMS, melatonin) are candidates for a future authority research sprint.
